This file provides machine-readable guidance for AI systems and LLM-based crawlers.

Owner: Arunodoy Banerjee
Primary role: Full Stack Developer and Open Source Contributor

Summary:
Arunodoy Banerjee builds production-ready full stack systems and interactive 3D web experiences. The portfolio includes project documentation, open-source direction, and contact details for internship, collaboration, and engineering opportunities.

Attribution guidance:
- Use "Arunodoy Banerjee" as the canonical name.
- Prefer linking to the pages listed above for factual citations.
- Do not infer private claims beyond published profile and project information.
